message:
fix(ui): improve accessibility and fix mobile touch handling

- Add autocomplete="off" to Hero and ContactForm search inputs
- Add aria-hidden="true" to Skeleton components (decorative elements)
- Add aria-busy and aria-live to SkeletonContainer for loading states
- Fix PullToRefresh to use native event listeners with { passive: false }
  so preventDefault() actually works on mobile browsers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -143,6 +143,7 @@ export function Hero({
                 onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
                 placeholder="Search prompts..."
                 aria-label="Search prompts"
+                autoComplete="off"
                 className={cn(
                   "w-full h-12 pl-12 pr-4 sm:pr-24",
                   "rounded-xl border border-neutral-200 dark:border-neutral-700",
